trigger.Name: trPlaceSecret
trigger.script:
local i=1 local gunlist = {"pktu01","pkt01","kord01","storm01","browning01","maxim01","vulcan01","kpvt01","rapier01","flag01","rainmetal01","bofors01","elephant01","odin01","omega01","bumblebee01","hammer01","hunterSideGun","mrakSideGun","big_swingfire01","cyclops01","octopus01","hailSideGun","hurricane01","rocketLauncher","zeusSideGun","marsSideGun"} local len = getn(gunlist)
while getObj("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")~=nil do -- println(i) CreateBoxWithAffixGun(CVector(getPos("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")), gunlist[exrandom(len)], random(0, 2)) i = i + 1 end
trigger:Deactivate()
